title: RunFailureArtifact
description: Schema for run_failure_latest.json written by sop._failure_reporter. This file is the sole authority for test_schema_drift.

schema_version.description: Schema version string. Optional field additions = minor bump. Required field additions = major bump. Type changes = major bump.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this run (e.g. UTC ISO timestamp or UUID).

entrypoint.description: How the process was invoked, e.g. 'sop run', 'python run_loop_cycle.py', 'python -m sop run'.

package_version.description: Version of the sop package (may equal tool_version).

python_version.description: Full sys.version string of the Python interpreter used.

cwd.description: Working directory at time of failure.

repo_root.description: Resolved absolute path to the repository root passed via --repo-root.

module_origins.description: Map of critical module names to their resolved __file__ paths.

failed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the failure was detected.

failed_component.description: Name of the component that failed (e.g. 'PhaseGate', 'run_cycle', 'WorkerRole').

reason.description: Human-readable description of why the failure occurred.

recoverability.description: Whether the failure is retryable without code changes.

install_check.description: Result of install preflight check: 'ok', 'failed', or 'unknown'.

provenance_check.description: Result of module provenance check: 'ok', 'diverged', or 'unknown'.

error_code.description: Machine-parseable error code from error_code_registry.json. 'UNKNOWN' when registry absent or lookup fails.

attempt_id.description: Identifier for a specific attempt within a run. Null when not tracked.

failure_origin.description: Coarse-grained lifecycle phase where the failure originated.

spec_phase.description: Spec phase label active at time of failure (e.g. 'phase3'). Null when not tracked.

decision_basis_count.description: Number of decision-basis entries evaluated before failure. Null when not tracked.

evaluation_outcome_source.description: Which evaluator produced the outcome leading to failure. Null when not tracked.

ArtifactRef.description: Reference to a single artifact captured at gate time for drift detection.

mtime_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC modification time of the artifact, or null if unreadable.

hash.description: sha256 hex digest (64 chars), or null if artifact absent/unreadable/oversized.

content_kind.description: Inferred content type: json, markdown, yaml, ndjson, or unknown.
